name: Goldenstone Acquisition Limited Warrants
summary: Goldenstone Acquisition Limited Warrants gives the holder the right to purchase shares of common stock of Goldenstone Acquisition Limited at a specified price. Goldenstone Acquisition Limited is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. Goldenstone Acquisition Limited is based in the United States.
